violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A box of whole raw beef cuts was stored on the floor under the drain pan for the walk in cooler. Water was dripping into the box.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wood bracing for the shelves behind the prep cooler is bare wood.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The counter top by the meat slicer is missing, with exposed wood. The top of the old chest freezer is rusty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors under the cooking equipment and in the stock room need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken floor tile under the dishwasher. Holes in the floor in the bar area.

Lighting. — --Light intensity for areas of handwash, warewash, equipment/utensil storage, food offering or toilet room was insufficient. The lights in the kitchen had bulbs that were burnt out and did not meet the requirements in food code.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The top of the old chest freezer is rusty. No longer a cleanable surface. The counter top by the slicer is broken. The wooden shelves above the prep cooler are bare wood for the supports, this is not a cleanable surface.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The shelves in the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foam containers on the counter between the door to the kitchen and glass door cooler were not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken and missing floor tile by the wall in cooler and in kitchen. Ceiling in walk in cooler is falling down.
